message:
feat(e2e): implement corpus verify guardrail (bd-1w6k.1.4)

Add `realdb-e2e corpus verify` subcommand that recomputes SHA-256 for
every golden database and compares against checksums.sha256. Exits
non-zero on any mismatch or missing file. Supports --checksums and
--golden-dir overrides for CI flexibility. 8 new tests + all 20
golden files pass verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
